title: Focus Beats
description: A premium standalone productivity platform that unifies a clean, minimal Pomodoro countdown dashboard with an interactive multi-channel ambient audio mixer deck. Designed around zero-dependency architectural rules, the app programmatically synthesizes 4 distinct focus channels (Rain, Café, White Noise, and Train Tracks) on the fly using random math buffers and low-pass filter paths running natively inside the browser's Web Audio API. Custom range inputs enable seamless track blending, complete with real-time state persistence tracked via client LocalStorage profiles.
